eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Jefferson, OR; at 11:22 AM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 2:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire emergency update from . sliver of Camp Sherman east of Green Ridge and SW of Bear Spring has been upgraded from a Level 1 to a Level 2: BE SET to evacuate. Act early if there is any reason you might need extra time. Leave right away if you feel you are in immediate danger. Akawa Butte Fire Facebook
